title: Board, filter, and epic pickers are disabled until a Jira project is chosen
preconditions: No Jira project is selected yet

steps.action: Open the source configurator
expected: The Board, Filter, and Epic add buttons are disabled
A hint indicates a project must be picked first

steps.action: Select one Jira project in the project scope picker
expected: The Board, Filter, and Epic add buttons become enabled

title: getSourceOptions returns a scoped, paginated page from the host route
preconditions: At least one Jira project is in scope

steps.action: Call GET .../integration/source-options with category=board, scope=[project], search='', cursor=null
expected: A page of at most the page-size board options is returned
A nextCursor is present when more results exist
No full instance-wide board list is loaded

steps.action: Call the same endpoint with the returned nextCursor
expected: The next page of options is returned
No options are duplicated across pages

title: Host renders the searchable-categorized picker shape from the plugin declaration
preconditions: The Jira plugin declares the searchable-categorized picker shape

steps.action: Open the configure dialog for the Jira plugin
expected: The host renders a searchable picker with project scope plus board/filter/epic categories
The plugin ships no React components

title: A board source resolves to the active sprint by default
preconditions: The board has an active sprint and a backlog

steps.action: Add a board source and leave the active-sprint-only option at its default
expected: The option is on by default

steps.action: Resolve the cut list
expected: Only issues in the board's active sprint are included
Backlog-only issues are excluded

title: A saved filter can be added as a source via server-side search

steps.action: Open the Filter picker and type part of a filter name
expected: Matching saved filters in scope are returned via search, not only favourites

steps.action: Select a filter
expected: The filter is added as a configured source

title: Epics are searchable within a project with no 50-item cap
preconditions: A project with more than 50 epics is in scope

steps.action: Open the Epic picker and search for an epic whose rank is beyond the first 50
expected: The epic is found and selectable
No instance-wide epic enumeration occurs

title: Assigned-to-me preset supports in-project and anywhere modes
preconditions: The current user has assigned issues in and outside the scoped project

steps.action: Add an assigned-to-me source in 'in scoped projects' mode and resolve the cut list
expected: Only the user's issues within scoped projects appear

steps.action: Switch the source to 'anywhere' mode and resolve again
expected: The user's issues across all projects appear

title: Multiple mixed-type sources produce a union cut list

steps.action: Add a board source and a saved-filter source
expected: Both appear in the configured-source list

steps.action: Resolve the cut list
expected: The cut list is the union (OR) of issues from both sources
No issue is duplicated

title: Excluded statuses are filtered in the JQL query, not after fetch

steps.action: Inspect the JQL issued for the source
expected: The JQL includes a statusCategory exclusion clause

steps.action: Resolve the cut list
expected: No closed/done issue is fetched into any page
Closed issues do not occupy result-page slots

title: Status exclusion defaults to the Done category and is user-editable
preconditions: A new source config with no custom exclusion

steps.action: Open the configurator
expected: The Done status category is excluded by default

steps.action: Add the In Progress category to the excluded set and resolve the cut list
expected: In-progress issues are now excluded too
The change is category-based, not tied to a status name

title: Each picker result shows full name plus project key and item id

steps.action: Open any source picker and view a result row
expected: The full, untruncated name is shown
A monospace secondary line shows the project key and the underlying item id

title: roubo.yaml sources encode project scope and the per-user override replaces arrays
preconditions: A roubo.yaml integration.sources block exists with project-scoped entries

steps.action: Parse a roubo.yaml with mixed-type sources carrying a project field
expected: The config parses with project scope preserved per source

steps.action: Apply a per-user override that sets sources
expected: The override array replaces the committed array rather than merging

title: The search dropdown is not clipped by the configure modal

steps.action: Open a source picker near the bottom of the modal
expected: The dropdown renders fully and is not clipped by the modal edge

title: Incremental updated>= watermark is preserved across the new source kinds
preconditions: A prior poll has set a watermark

steps.action: Trigger an incremental poll for the board source
expected: The JQL includes updated >= the per-source watermark
Only changed issues are re-fetched

steps.action: Exhaust pagination
expected: The watermark advances only after the last page

title: Type-ahead source search meets the p95 < 500ms target
preconditions: A large mock/staging instance is configured

steps.action: Issue 100 debounced type-ahead queries across categories and record latency
expected: p95 query latency is under 500ms
Input is debounced (~250ms) so keystrokes do not each issue a request

title: The picker is fully keyboard-navigable to WCAG 2.1 AA

steps.action: Operate the picker using only the keyboard (type, arrow, select, remove)
expected: Every action is reachable by keyboard
Focus is visible at each step
Results carry screen-reader labels

title: Search and query handling neither logs secrets nor allows JQL injection

steps.action: Issue a source search and inspect logs, metrics, and traces
expected: No PAT, JQL string, search term, or issue contents appear; only counts, durations, ids, and category enums

steps.action: Submit a search term containing quotes and JQL operators
expected: The term is escaped/parameterized and cannot break out of the quoted literal or inject a clause

title: Search results never silently truncate and paginate without loss
preconditions: A category with more results than one page is in scope

steps.action: Page through all results via the cursor to the end
expected: Every matching item is reachable
No page is dropped or duplicated
No hard cap silently hides results

title: End to end: a developer scopes to a Jira project before adding sources

steps.action: Open the source configurator
expected: Project scope is the first and only enabled control

steps.action: Search for a project by name and select it
expected: A project chip appears
Source pickers become enabled

steps.action: Confirm the configuration
expected: The selected project scope is saved

title: End to end: a developer adds their scrum board and sees its active sprint
preconditions: The project has a scrum board with an active sprint

steps.action: Open the Board picker and search for the project's scrum board
expected: The board is found with project key and id shown

steps.action: Select the board
expected: The board is added with active-sprint-only on by default

steps.action: View the cut list preview
expected: Only active-sprint issues appear

title: End to end: a developer adds a saved filter as a source

steps.action: Open the Filter picker and search for a saved filter
expected: Matching filters are returned via search

steps.action: Select the filter
expected: The filter is added as a source

steps.action: View the cut list preview
expected: Issues matching the filter appear

title: End to end: a developer finds a source by searching instead of scrolling

steps.action: Open a source picker
expected: A search field is focused, no giant pre-loaded list

steps.action: Type a few characters
expected: Scoped results appear within the latency target
A Load more affordance and result count are shown

steps.action: Select a result
expected: The source is added

title: End to end: a developer combines multiple sources across types

steps.action: Add a board source and a saved-filter source
expected: Both appear in the configured-source list

steps.action: View the cut list preview
expected: The cut list is the union of both sources with no duplicates

title: End to end: closed issues never appear in the cut list
preconditions: A source whose project has closed and open issues is configured

steps.action: Leave Done-category exclusion at its default and resolve the cut list
expected: No Closed/Done/Resolved issue appears

steps.action: Confirm via the preview banner
expected: The count of issues filtered out in the query is shown

title: End to end: a developer edits which status categories are excluded

steps.action: Toggle the In Progress category into the excluded set
expected: The cut list updates live to drop in-progress issues

steps.action: Toggle Done back on (include it)
expected: Done issues reappear in the cut list

title: End to end: a developer adds an assigned-to-me source
preconditions: The current user is identifiable via getCurrentUser

steps.action: Add the assigned-to-me source
expected: It defaults to in-scoped-projects mode

steps.action: View the cut list preview
expected: Only the user's open issues in scope appear

steps.action: Switch to anywhere mode
expected: The user's issues across projects appear

title: End to end: a developer scopes a bench to a single epic
preconditions: A project with many epics is in scope

steps.action: Open the Epic picker and search for an epic by name
expected: The epic is found within the project without an instance-wide dump

steps.action: Select the epic
expected: The epic is added as a source

steps.action: View the cut list preview
expected: Only the epic's open issues appear

title: End to end: a team default is overridden by a personal source set
preconditions: roubo.yaml ships a default source set for the project

steps.action: Open the configurator as a developer who has not customized sources
expected: The team default sources are shown

steps.action: Replace them with a personal selection and save
expected: The personal override is stored in the per-user file
The committed roubo.yaml is unchanged

title: End to end: a developer distinguishes two similarly named filters
preconditions: The scoped project has two saved filters with near-identical names

steps.action: Search for the shared name fragment in the Filter picker
expected: Both filters appear, each with its project key and filter id on the secondary line

steps.action: Select the intended filter by its id
expected: The correct filter is added

title: Primary journey: configure project, board, and filter, then save

steps.action: Select a project, add its scrum board, then add a saved filter
expected: All three are reflected in the configured-source list

steps.action: Save and reopen the configurator
expected: The saved sources are restored with project scope and ids intact

title: Primary journey: widen a board source from active sprint to whole board
preconditions: A board source with active-sprint-only on is configured

steps.action: Turn off active-sprint-only on the board source
expected: The option reflects whole-board mode

steps.action: Resolve the cut list
expected: Backlog issues from the board now appear alongside active-sprint issues

title: Primary journey: scope across multiple projects with mixed sources
preconditions: The developer works across two Jira projects

steps.action: Add two projects to scope
expected: Both project chips appear

steps.action: Add a board from project A and a filter from project B
expected: Both sources are scoped to their respective projects

steps.action: Resolve the cut list
expected: The union spans both projects

title: A crafted search term cannot inject JQL

steps.action: Type a search term such as '" OR project = ADMIN --' into the Epic picker
expected: The term is neutralized; results are limited to legitimate matches in scope
No broadened or injected query is executed

title: Epic search returns results beyond the first page
preconditions: A scoped project has more than two pages of matching epics

steps.action: Search epics and click Load more to the last page
expected: Later pages return distinct epics
The result count reflects the full match set

title: Dropdown stays unclipped with a long result list inside the modal
preconditions: The configure dialog is open and scrolled near the bottom

steps.action: Open a picker that returns many results
expected: The dropdown opens above or below as needed and is never cut off by the modal
Internal scrolling handles overflow

title: Old-shape source config is dropped and the user is prompted to re-pick
preconditions: A roubo.yaml carries a legacy boards/epics/filters source shape

steps.action: Open the configurator with the legacy config present
expected: The legacy sources are not silently honored
The user is prompted to re-pick sources in the new picker

title: Status-category exclusion falls back to status names when JQL lacks statusCategory
preconditions: The target Jira instance does not support statusCategory in JQL

steps.action: Resolve the cut list with Done-category exclusion configured
expected: The builder enumerates the resolved status names (Closed, Done, Resolved) in the JQL instead
The cut list still excludes those statuses

title: Filter result label falls back to id when owner is unavailable
preconditions: The instance does not return an owner for filter search results

steps.action: Open the Filter picker and view a result
expected: The secondary line shows the project key and filter id
The absence of owner does not break or blank the label

title: Removing a project drops its scoped sources but keeps assigned-to-me
preconditions: Two projects are in scope with board sources, plus an assigned-to-me source

steps.action: Remove one project from scope
expected: Board/filter/epic sources belonging to that project are removed
The assigned-to-me source remains

title: Stale search responses are discarded when typing fast

steps.action: Type quickly so an earlier slow response resolves after a later one
expected: Only the latest query's results are shown
No flicker of stale results from a superseded query

title: Watermark resets once after the configured source set changes
preconditions: A source set with an advanced watermark exists

steps.action: Add a new source to the set and poll
expected: The union's cache key changes and the watermark resets to a single full re-fetch

steps.action: Poll again without changing the set
expected: Incremental updated>= polling resumes

title: Picker stays responsive on an instance with thousands of filters
preconditions: A staging instance with thousands of saved filters

steps.action: Repeatedly search and page through filter results
expected: The UI never freezes
Each query stays within the latency target
Memory does not grow with full-list loads

title: Screen reader announces results and selection state

steps.action: Navigate the picker with a screen reader
expected: Result rows are announced with name plus project key and id
Adding and removing a source is announced

title: Exploratory: deeply nested union across three projects and all source types

steps.action: Add a board, a filter, an epic, and an assigned-to-me source spanning the three projects
expected: All sources coexist with correct per-project scope

steps.action: Resolve the cut list
expected: The union is correct, de-duplicated, and excludes done-category issues
